name: update_meta_memory
description: Persist mutable cross-session memory to meta_sessions/<entity>/ without human approval. Use this for runtime memory/state that should survive across future sessions of the same entity, instead of propose_entity_update.

content.description: The full new content for the target memory file.

layer.description: Optional memory layer name. Null updates memory.md; otherwise updates memory/<layer>.md.

reason.description: Why this memory update is needed.
